title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain built Glean, a $7 billion company, by focusing on solving a real problem his team faced: information retrieval and search. His strategy emphasized focus and avoiding redundant competition rather than building larger models or better pitch decks, summed up in the principle "Build Less, Win More."
